expectations.text: Adds a confirmModal (or similar) state to the existing state machine via iota
expectations.evidence: confirmModal state added as 4th iota constant after bodyView

expectations.text: Uses lipgloss.Place() with lipgloss.Center alignment to center the modal
Modal has a border (lipgloss.RoundedBorder or similar)
The background list content is rendered underneath the modal (not blank)
expectations.evidence: bg := m.renderList() is computed but passed to renderModal() where it is never used — Place() fills with whitespace. List not visible.

expectations.text: Keyboard input in the confirmModal state only handles y/n/esc — other keys are not forwarded to the list
expectations.evidence: confirmModal case only handles y/Y, n/N, esc — no fallthrough to list handling

expectations.text: Pressing y triggers a delete action and returns to listView
expectations.evidence: case "y", "Y": deletes from m.notes slice and sets m.state = listView

expectations.text: Pressing n or esc cancels and returns to listView
